Thanks for contributing. Delete any section that does not apply.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for entry formats and the sourcing rules.
-->

## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. Which entries, and why. -->

## Sourcing

<!-- Required for any data change. Link where each new value came from. -->

- [ ] I opened every link I added or changed and confirmed it resolves to the resource I claim.
- [ ] Titles, venues, and years match the published record (not a preprint variant).
- [ ] `verified` dates are the date I actually checked the link.
- [ ] Any leaderboard row I added cites a paper reporting that exact number on that exact benchmark.
- [ ] I did not add a score, BibTeX entry, size, or license I could not source. Unknown fields are omitted, not guessed.

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] For view changes: checked in both light and dark mode

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything uncertain? Fields you deliberately left out? Say so here — that is
     more useful than a confident-looking entry that turns out to be wrong. -->
